title: TabCtrl Native Bridge Config
description: Allowlist and safety limits for TabCtrl's optional native messaging bridge.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing to this schema.

commands.description: Map logical command names used by TabCtrl to executable candidates.

maxTimeoutMs.description: Maximum native command runtime. The extension caps this at 120000 ms.

maxOutputBytes.description: Maximum stdout/stderr bytes retained from a native command.

allowCwd.description: Allow model-provided working directories. Keep false unless a dedicated CLI truly needs it.

candidate.description: Executable name or path. Environment variables such as %APPDATA%, $HOME, ${HOME}, and ~ are expanded by the host.

oneOf.description: Legacy command entry: candidates used on every platform.

Platform-aware command entry. Avoid shells or interpreters such as cmd, powershell, bash, python, and node; keep high-capability tools such as git, curl, docker, kubectl, and package managers on manual approval.
